title: Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 on the official website - mbse.edu.in on 29th April 2026 at 12PM. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MBSE HSSLC Result 2026.

content.text: The Mizoram Board of School Education (MBSE) has officially released the MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 for the academic session 2025-26 today. Students who appeared for the Class 12 board examinations across Arts, Science and Commerce streams can now check their results online. MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 has been released online on the official websites - mbse.edu.in and the result portal mbseonline.com.

The board has published results for HSSLC students from all streams and districts of Mizoram. Students can now check and download their provisional marksheet by entering their roll number and registration number on the official result portals.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the online marksheet, including their name, roll number, subjects, marks obtained, total marks, division and qualifying status. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the board authorities or their respective schools for necessary corrections.

sections.heading: Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The MBSE has released the HSSLC Result 2026 on its official website for the current academic session. Students can access their Mizoram Board Class 12 result online using their roll number and registration number through the official result portals. The result includes subject-wise marks, total marks and overall pass/fail status.

rows: Higher Secondary School Leaving Certificate (HSSLC) Exam

sections.heading: Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The MBSE has activated the direct link to check HSSLC Result 2026 on its official result portals. Students can quickly access their Mizoram Board Class 12 result using the direct link provided below and download their provisional online marksheet for reference.

sections.heading: How to Check Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check your Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official website - mbse.edu.in or the result portal mbseonline.com.
On the homepage, click on the link “HSSLC Examination Results 2026” / “MBSE HSSLC Exam Result 2026”.
Enter your Roll Number and Registration Number in the login fields
Click on the Submit / Search Results button
Your Mizoram MBSE HSSLC Result 2026 marksheet will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout of the online marksheet for future reference
